---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the harness
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The job to be done**
What are you trying to accomplish that LLM-GTD makes hard today?

**Proposed change**
What you'd like to see.

**Which layer**
- [ ] State (`memory/gtd/` lists)
- [ ] Logic (skill workflow)
- [ ] Adapter (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex front-end)
- [ ] Cadence (review / reminders)

**GTD fit (important)**
Does this keep the human in the loop for *choosing* and *reflecting*? Does it respect the
single-calendar and fail-closed-on-writes principles? Why or why not?

**Alternatives considered**
